ha2656dc2g631dg44c3g9619g3958c9a6195b: They'll guard that empty tomb until their bones turn to dust. What a pathetic existence.
h993b2f9fgd854g464dg950dg987437856e2b: Pathetic and unsettling. Not how I'd want to spend eternity.
h60353dbbgb5afg4dc0gaeb8g2956bf84c6c1: It could be worse. At least they don't understand the horror of their existence.
h7b314992gd5b8g4a93gabeag7860d9464180: So some monsters are going to rot. Why should I care?
he77494a7g4c49g4d2dg970fga9210fe4033b: Oh, you never know. Some day you might end up as one.
ha9265ac3ga317g435agbb1fgd7e300c96bc4: Don't you feel even a little sorry for them?
h697f6392ge093g4e9aga35dg61bceeeb592e: They're unthinking cadavers. I may as well feel sorry for a bread basket.
he9b1a037gca41g408dgaa6fg7ef1f129b905: I can't believe we ran from clacking old bones.
h5f964a04gac94g42a5gb41bgd8000e879d33: I'm sure there will be plenty of opportunities to recover our dignity later.
hedd6dd7bg6c92g4c20g9ddagc20235ee88ef: Next time we'll grind their bones to make our bread.
h23d07a9cg81c0g4749g83aeg6c2c10468b04: Your bread. I'm not really a 'bread' kind of person.
h4aa30389g3b93g4cc2gb16agb58e0353519f: We're alive. That's all that matters.
h51f03d74g284ag4f9fgae58gb557aa35cee5: Sure, rub it in why don't you.
hc5d47aafg5710g41ebg8712gd058abc92fc5: Sorry bones, guarding dusty trinkets. Pathetic.
h3688561bg987bg4bd1gbdc6g8c1cc9117c57: They're monsters. I wouldn't give them a second thought.
h6d328010g0171g4929ga56fgc640fee23543: Fair enough. But you never know when you might become one yourself.
